## Asset Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Type** | prompt / skill / agent / workflow / automation |
| **Work Stream** | architects / capacity-management / developers / performance-engineers / sre / system-designers / testers / shared |
| **Proposed File Path** | `workstreams/<work-stream>/<type>/<filename>.md` |

## Security Classification

- [ ] Public
- [ ] Internal *(default)*

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the repo and confirmed this does not duplicate existing content.
- [ ] I have used the appropriate template from `templates/`.
- [ ] The YAML front matter is complete and valid.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII are included.
- [ ] I have updated `catalog/index.json`.
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
